A

add(Player, Consumer<String>, Consumer<Player>) - Static method in class dk.tohjuler.mcutils.chat.ChatInput
Deprecated.
Use ChatInput.add(Player, Consumer, Runnable) instead

Add a chat input Remember to handler all messages.

applyPlaceholder(Player) - Method in class dk.tohjuler.mcutils.items.ItemBuilder
Apply placeholders to the item This requires PlaceholderAPI to be installed Applies to: - Display name - Lore
applyTo(String) - Method in class dk.tohjuler.mcutils.config.Lang.Sound
 
applyType(ItemStack) - Method in class dk.tohjuler.mcutils.items.ItemBuilder
Transform the item to a different type This will keep the amount, display name, lore, enchantments, unstackable status and item flags
